body:
If you are dealing with a broken spring, worn rollers, or snapped cables, several highly rated, local garage door companies serve the Pleasanton area and specialize in fast hardware replacement. [4 Best Pleasanton, CA Garage Door Repair Companies | Expertise.com](https://www.expertise.com/home-improvement/garage-doors/california/pleasanton#:~:text=The%20company%20has%20installed%20a,with%20ones%20of%20equal%20quality.)

Here are the top local choices based on reliability, response time, and expert technician ratings:

### 1\. Precision Garage Door of East Bay

  * **Location:** 405 Boulder Court, Pleasanton, CA 94566 [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=You%20can%20read%20more%20about,our%20location%20on%20Boulder%20Court.)

  * **Why Them:** They are **Diamond Certified** and have a local office right in Pleasanton. Their biggest advantage for hardware replacement is that their trucks arrive fully stocked with a massive inventory of high-quality parts (springs, cables, rollers, openers), meaning they can almost always finish the repair on the very first visit. They offer appointments 7 days a week from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM with no extra charge for evenings or weekends. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=We%20schedule%20appointments%20seven%20days,pull%20out%20of%20your%20driveway.)

### 2\. Garage Door Pros

  * **Location:** 653 Valley Avenue, Pleasanton, CA 94566 [4 Best Pleasanton, CA Garage Door Repair Companies | Expertise.com](https://www.expertise.com/home-improvement/garage-doors/california/pleasanton)

  * **Why Them:** Operating since 2013, this is a highly rated, fully licensed, bonded, and insured local shop (boasting a 4.9-star rating on Yelp). They focus on common hardware failures such as snapped cables, worn weather seals, and off-track adjustments, and they offer 24/7 emergency services if your car is trapped inside. [4 Best Pleasanton, CA Garage Door Repair Companies | Expertise.com](https://www.expertise.com/home-improvement/garage-doors/california/pleasanton#:~:text=Garage%20Door%20Pros-,Best%20Garage%20Door%20Repair%20Companies%20Serving%20Pleasanton,Why%20choose%20this%20provider%3F)[4 Best Pleasanton, CA Garage Door Repair Companies | Expertise.com](https://www.expertise.com/home-improvement/garage-doors/california/pleasanton#:~:text=Founded%20in%202013%2C%20Garage%20Door,serves%20residential%20and%20commercial%20customers.)

  * **Location:** 3037 Hopyard Rd Ste G, Pleasanton, CA 94588 [Lions Garage Door Repair Pleasanton](https://pleasantongaragedoorrepair.org/)

If you aren't completely sure which hardware components need to be replaced, they will diagnose it for free. They operate 24/7 and are factory-trained to handle a variety of hardware brands. [Lions Garage Door Repair Pleasanton](https://pleasantongaragedoorrepair.org/#:~:text=Chain%20Drive%20Belt%20Drive%20DIY,per%20job)[Lions Garage Door Repair Pleasanton](https://pleasantongaragedoorrepair.org/#:~:text=Hayward-,Walnut%20Creek,Hours%3A%2024%2F7)

  * **Location:** Based in Pleasanton, CA [Lions Garage Door Repair Pleasanton](https://pleasantongaragedoorrepair.org/)

With over three decades of experience, they have won industry awards (like National Dealer of the Year) and specialize in everything from simple hinge replacements to complex high-cycle spring setups. [The 10 Best Garage Door Installers in Pleasanton, CA (2026) - HomeGuide](https://homeguide.com/ca/pleasanton/garage-door-installation/#:~:text=Garage%20Doors%20Unlimited%2C%20founded%20in,tackle%20complex%20garage%20door%20projects.)

### 💡 Quick Tips for Hardware Replacement

  * **The Torsion Spring Rule:** If you are replacing a broken garage door spring, it's highly recommended to replace _both_ springs at the same time. They have the same lifespan, and if one snaps, the second one is usually not far behind.

  * **Upgrade to Nylon Rollers:** If the company is replacing your door's rollers, ask about upgrading from standard steel to **sealed nylon rollers**. They require less lubrication and will make your garage door significantly quieter.

What specific hardware is giving you trouble? If your door is completely stuck or off its tracks, I can help you figure out if it's safe to handle or if it requires immediate emergency service.
